clips.status: FLAGGED — video clips cannot be sourced by image search. These require YouTube download or stock footage search. The Researcher flags this as a gap — the user must source video clips manually, or we use AI video generation tools as an alternative.
clips.law_1_note: The Researcher does NOT substitute close-enough clips. Video clips from YouTube require yt-dlp and cannot be verified content without watching. Per Law 1, the Researcher flags this rather than guessing.
clips.recommended_action: User sources video clips from YouTube using the search_hints in the Manifest. Alternatively, use AI video generation (z-ai video) for B-roll — but this requires a different aesthetic approach.

audio.status: FLAGGED — background music bed requires a royalty-free music source. The Researcher cannot source copyrighted music. Options: (1) user provides royalty-free track, (2) use AI music generation, (3) use silence with voice-only (simpler for first test).
audio.recommended_action: For first test run, use voice-only (no music bed). The template's music bed is a refinement — the structure works without it. Add music in a later iteration.
